critique_method: dual-agent (Assessment A: design/UX Nielsen heuristics, Assessment B: CLI accessibility tree)

pre_fix_findings.description: Download button calls window.alert() — blocking system dialog; not a real download interaction; breaks the core post-purchase flow
Cart naming inconsistency: empty-state heading 'Your collection is empty' while cart page h1 reads 'Your cart' — mixed vocabulary confuses the user's mental model
aria-invalid='true' set on form fields on validation failure but no visible visual change — error state invisible to sighted users

h1 'Art for the wall
you actually have' produces 'wallyou' in accessibility tree — no space before
SVG <text> elements inside PosterArtwork lack aria-hidden; screen readers announce decorative SVG text as content
Terms checkbox uses hardcoded id='terms-agree' — unique-id contract broken, would duplicate if multiple forms on page
FormatSelector buttons and download button below 44px minimum touch target

fixes_applied.fix:
Replaced window.alert() with useState>(new Set()) downloadedNow; button label changes to 'Download again'; inline

✓ Synthetic download complete

appears below button. Browser verified: click → 'DOWNLOADED' status, 'Download again' label, inline sage-green confirmation, no alert() dialog.
Empty-state heading changed to match h1; breadcrumb 'Collection' → 'Cart'; 'Your cart' now consistent across the entire purchase flow

Added @layer utilities: input[aria-invalid='true'], textarea[aria-invalid='true'] { border-color: rgb(220 38 38) !important; --tw-ring-color: rgb(220 38 38 / 0.25); } — red-600 border appears on invalid fields

Added {' '} before
in hero h1: 'Art for the wall{" "}
you actually have.' — accessibility tree now reads correctly
Added aria-hidden='true' to all four <text> elements inside the SVG artwork placeholder
const termsId = useId() replaces hardcoded id='terms-agree'; htmlFor={termsId} on label
Added min-h-[44px] to format selector button className
Added min-h-[44px] to download button className

post_fix_heuristics.note: Heuristics use 0-4 per dimension. Score 2 on H3 (no undo on cart remove), H7 (basic flow, no shortcuts), H10 (policy pages present but no help centre). Cleared all P0 findings.

build_post_fix.notes: Build confirmed exit 0 after all QA fixes. Dev server verified at localhost:3005.

golden_path_walked: /poster/poster-001 — format selector, price, add to cart
/cart — 'Your cart' heading, item with thumbnail, promo code section, 'Proceed to checkout'
/checkout — breadcrumb Cart·Checkout, all fields, order summary sidebar, 'Pay $10.00'
/order/ORD-MRYX2CPM — 'Order confirmed', 'Ready to download' status, 'Download PDF' button
Download PDF clicked — button → 'Download again', status → 'A4 · DOWNLOADED', inline '✓ Synthetic download complete', NO alert() dialog
Cancel button disappeared after download (canCancel returns false)

nonclaim_text: Synthetic cohort only — these KPIs do not prove real demand, real conversion, or real financial performance.
